question: The customer satisfaction survey will conclude in Month 6. Based on the chart, which of the following is true about which service will ultimately be preferred?

options.A: The final preferred service cannot be determined from this chart.
options.B: Service A will be the preferred service at the end of the survey.
options.C: Service C will be the preferred service at the end of the survey.
options.D: Service B will be the preferred service at the end of the survey.

explanation: While Service C currently has the highest satisfaction (48.2), the chart shows results as of Month 2, but the survey period concludes in Month 6. The remaining survey period could dramatically change the outcome, making it premature to predict a winner. The concealed uncertainty lies in the incomplete survey period that is not reflected in the chart.
